description: Contact Domain Model Fixes. (1) reconstitute() silently substitutes unknown@unknown.com for invalid emails — should Result.fail or throw (D-01). (2) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check — linkToLead correctly checks but merge doesn't (D-02). (3) No ContactDeletedEvent — deleteContact publishes no events, audit handler has mapping but event never emitted (D-04). (4) No ContactEmailChangedEvent — old email not captured in generic ContactUpdatedEvent (D-05). (5) Tags update always emits event without deep equality check (D-07). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §18.
notes: Contact audit finding: D-01,D-02,D-04,D-05,D-07. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
